---
name: Pinned Showpiece
about: Build and polish the pinned highlight section.
title: "Pinned Showpiece - [Your Name]"
labels: "p1-required,motion"

---

## Goal

Build the main pinned showpiece section so it becomes a clear highlight moment in the scrolling story without creating layout jumps or confusing timing.

## Definition of Done

- [ ] At least 1 pinned showpiece section
- [ ] Includes 3+ internal animation steps
- [ ] Pinning transitions cleanly (no layout jump)

## Files / Links

- Likely files:
  - `index.html`
  - `styles/`
  - `scripts/main.js`
- Preview URL:
- Motion Map:
- Related issue(s):

## Constraints

- Link the Motion Map and note why this section is the showpiece.
- Keep the pinned sequence readable, not just flashy.
- Do not introduce layout jumps before or after the pin.

## Verification

- [ ] Pinned section activates and releases cleanly
- [ ] Internal steps play in the intended order
- [ ] Browser and console check completed
- [ ] Evidence added below

## Agent Handoff

Work this issue in my repo. Follow the Goal, Definition of Done, Files / Links, Constraints, and Verification sections. Do not change files outside the listed scope without approval. When done, report what changed, how you verified it, and any open risks before I close the issue.

## Evidence

- [ ] Commit(s) linked
- [ ] Clip/GIF of pinned sequence in action
